chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-257 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 02-02-2026. Mr. Afzal Kareem Virk advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ali Hassan Chandio advocate for the respondents. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant P.G. = Heard learned counsel for the parties and perused the record. It has come on record that the trial of the case is proceeding and evidence is yet to be recorded. The respondents/ accused are regularly appearing before the learned trial Court to face their trial. It is settled law that once a person is granted bail on merit, its cancellation requires extra ordinarily circumstances, which may include any sort of severe threat by the accused side to the complainant party. However, no such allegation or ground has been agitated before this Court. No case for cancelation of bail is made out; hence instant Criminal Misc. Application is hereby dismissed. However, learned trial Court is directed to conclude the trial within a period of two months. JUDGE *Saleem*
